channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Moncton cancer survivor travels across Canada by hitchhiking, sharing a story of resilience and kindness
item.description: A cancer survivor from Moncton, New Brunswick, is undertaking a remarkable journey across Canada by hitchhiking, using the experience as both a personal milestone and a way to reflect on recovery and ...

item.title: Trans Niger Pipeline reports zero infractions amid improved oil security as Nigeria nears OPEC production target
item.description: The Pipeline Infrastructure Nigeria Limited (PINL) has reported that the Trans Niger Pipeline recorded zero infractions in the past month, indicating a strong improvement in pipeline security and redu...

item.title: Jessica Hull falls after collision in women’s 1500m final at Australian athletics championships
item.description: Jessica Hull was involved in a dramatic incident during the women’s 1500 metres final at the Australian athletics championships, where she fell heavily in the closing stages of a tightly contested spr...

item.title: GKN Aerospace facility linked to Orange County chemical tank emergency in Garden Grove
item.description: A chemical emergency in Garden Grove, Orange County, has drawn attention to GKN Aerospace, a UK-based aerospace manufacturer operating a large facility on Western Avenue. The incident centers on a tan...

item.title: DCI arrests terror suspect in Garissa, recovers suspected explosive device during police operation
item.description: Police officers in Garissa County successfully arrested a suspected terror suspect following a dramatic chase on Saturday, May 23. The suspect, identified as Hussein Issa Baraki, was first noticed by ...

item.title: Orlando Pirates end 14-year league drought with victory over Orbit College
item.description: Orlando Pirates secured their first league title in 14 years after beating Orbit College 2-0 at Mbombela Stadium in a dramatic final-day clash. The victory ended Mamelodi Sundowns’ run of eight consec...

item.title: Factory Operations Suspended Following Death of Owner Amid Business Continuity Concerns
item.description: Kifo cha ghafla cha mmiliki wa kiwanda kimesababisha kusimama kwa shughuli za uzalishaji pamoja na nafasi za ajira katika eneo husika, jambo lililoleta wasiwasi mkubwa kwa wafanyakazi na jamii inayote...

item.title: Competitive Three-Way Race Shapes Los Angeles City Attorney Election Amid Controversy and Legal Challenges
item.description: The Los Angeles city attorney race has become unexpectedly competitive, marked by controversy, shifting alliances, and high financial stakes. Incumbent Hydee Feldstein Soto is seeking reelection while...

item.title: SpaceX Starship V3 completes first test flight with controlled splashdown after explosive re-entry
item.description: SpaceX’s Starship V3 has completed its debut uncrewed test flight, ending in a dramatic but planned fiery descent and splashdown in the Indian Ocean. The towering rocket lifted off on Friday evening f...

item.title: Bangladesh faces severe measles outbreak with over 500 suspected and confirmed deaths
item.description: Bangladesh is experiencing one of its most severe measles outbreaks in decades, with health authorities reporting more than 500 suspected and confirmed deaths linked to the disease this year. Accordin...

item.title: Njombe police detain suspect over killing of Kiwe village executive officer in machete attack
item.description: Police in Njombe Region are holding a 34-year-old resident of Kiwe village in Mawengi Ward, Ludewa District, Mr Kalisto Haule, on suspicion of killing the village executive officer, Mr Peter Ng’ingo (...

item.title: Cavite resident wins ₱24.1 million Lotto 6/42 jackpot
item.description: A lottery player from Cavite province has won the ₱24.1 million jackpot prize in the Philippine Charity Sweepstakes Office (PCSO) Lotto 6/42 draw held on Saturday night, as reported by authorities. Th...

item.title: Angelique Manto Showcases Elegant and Minimalist Bridal Beauty Looks at Her Wedding

item.title: DOJ Defends Removal of Jan. 6 Riot Records From Its Website Amid Political Backlash
item.description: The article reports on controversy surrounding the U.S. Department of Justice under the Trump administration after officials acknowledged removing online records related to individuals convicted for c...

item.title: Diana Marua raises concerns over long-term relationship status with Bahati amid delayed wedding plans
item.description: Diana Marua, a popular Kenyan YouTuber and partner to musician Kevin Bahati, has openly questioned why the two have not yet formalised their union through a legal marriage, despite being together for ...

item.title: GOP strategist criticizes Trump administration’s $1.7B settlement as politically damaging ahead of midterms

item.title: Orlando Pirates win first PSL title in 14 years after dramatic victory over Orbit College
item.description: Orlando Pirates secured the 2025/26 Betway Premiership title with a dramatic 2-0 victory over Orbit College at Mbombela Stadium, ending Mamelodi Sundowns’ eight-year dominance of South African league ...

item.title: Cris Villanueva Wins P50,000 in Kapamilya Deal or No Deal Appearance
item.description: Actor Cris Villanueva successfully brought home P50,000 after joining the popular game show “Kapamilya Deal or No Deal.” The episode was featured by ABS-CBN Studios and published on May 23, 2026. The ...

item.title: France temporarily halts additional EU border checks at Dover after severe holiday traffic delays
item.description: French authorities have temporarily suspended additional EU border processing measures at the Port of Dover following significant traffic congestion and lengthy queues affecting thousands of holidayma...

item.title: Research identifies PAHs in common foods and advances methods for detecting cooking-related contaminants
item.description: A recent study from researchers at Seoul National University of Science and Technology highlights the presence of potentially harmful chemical compounds, known as polycyclic aromatic hydrocarbons (PAH...
